data.title: China's Central Bank Reports Closure Of Domestic Crypto Platforms
data.description: According to Foresight News, on this day in 2022, China's central bank released its monetary policy implementation report for the fourth quarter of 2021. The report highlighted the closure of domestic virtual currency trading and token issuance financing platforms.

data.title: BscScan Undergoes Unplanned Maintenance Due To Database Issues
data.description: According to Foresight News, BNB Smart Chain explorer BscScan announced last night that it is undergoing unplanned maintenance due to issues with its database service. The engineering team is actively working to resolve the problem. As a result, the website has paused block data updates for approximately 12 hours.

data.title: Tether Emerges as Popular Choice in Hong Kong Crypto Exchanges
data.description: According to Foresight News, a recent report by Wen Wei Po reveals that Tether is the most favored cryptocurrency among Hong Kong's over-the-counter (OTC) crypto exchanges. The investigation found that approximately half of these exchanges allow cash to be converted into cryptocurrencies without requiring real-name registration. Currently, these exchanges are not obligated to submit transaction reports to law enforcement agencies. A staff member from a shop participating in Know Your Customer (KYC) certification stated that personal information registration is only necessary for cash purchases of cryptocurrencies amounting to 120,000 Hong Kong dollars or more.

data.title: Warpcast launches new feature, token symbol or CA in the information flow can jump to the holder's share
data.description: Farcaster co-founder Dan Romero said that Warpcast has launched a new feature that allows token symbols or CA in the information flow to jump to the holder's share ratio. If users browse to the token CA on the homepage information flow page, they can click to jump to the token details page, including the share ratio and holding value of the holder of the associated Farcaster account, and can exchange tokens.

data.title: Ethereum Developers Aim For Faster Protocol Upgrades
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ethereum core developers and ecosystem leaders expressed support for accelerating the deployment of future Ethereum protocol upgrades during an 'All Core Devs' meeting on February 13. The meeting, which included at least 25 participants such as Ethereum Foundation researcher Tim Beiko, focused on the upcoming Pectra and Fusaka upgrades.

Nixo Rokish, a member of the Ethereum Foundation's protocol support team, highlighted a strong consensus from the Pectra Retrospective post, indicating a desire for quicker fork cadences. This approach would require less deliberation on scope and more decisive opinions. The Pectra upgrade, scheduled for April, aims to enhance crypto wallet functionality and improve user experience. It could be one of the largest upgrades in Ethereum's history, incorporating up to 20 Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIPs). These proposals not only aim to improve user experience but also include scaling measures to increase the data availability blob count from three to six. Beiko announced that Pectra system contracts would launch on the Ethereum mainnet on February 17.

Additionally, Ethereum developers have set an April 10 deadline to finalize the Fusaka upgrade, which includes several EIPs focused on enhancing the transaction inclusion process. Developers have until March 13 to propose their 'Proposed for Inclusion' EIPs for Fusaka, while the community is expected to share their preferences for EIPs by March 27. This push for faster updates comes as crypto-focused venture capital firm Paradigm urged Ethereum core developers to expedite protocol updates, achieve more milestones on its technical roadmap, and maintain its competitive edge as a leading layer 1 blockchain. Paradigm emphasized that Ethereum could accelerate high-impact improvements without compromising its core values, suggesting that discussions on value tradeoffs might be premature and could lead to unnecessary rigidity. Empowering developers with a mandate to move faster and in parallel could enable Ethereum to address issues more swiftly and avoid getting bogged down in premature debates.

data.title: DeFi.app Completes $4 Million Funding at a $100 Million Valuation, Led by Mechanism Capital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DeFi trading platform DeFi.app announced that it has completed $4 million in financing at a valuation of $100 million, led by Mechanism Capital, with participation from DCF Capital Partners, Balaji Srinivasan and Pentoshi. DeFi.app plans to conduct a public token sale to non-US KYC users later this month. (The Block)

data.title: Fidelity FBTC saw a net outflow of $94.5 million yesterday
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Farside Investors data, Fidelity FBTC had a net outflow of US$94.5 million yesterday.

data.title: Planet Morning News
Invesco’s BTCO had a net outflow of $4.8 million yesterday
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Farside Investors data, Invesco's BTCO had a net outflow of $4.8 million yesterday.

data.title: VanEck Advisor: Tether currently holds about $5.3 billion in precious metals and $7.8 billion in Bitcoin
data.description: Gabor Gurbacs, Tether strategist and VanEck advisor, said on X platform that Tether's latest certification report shows that it holds about $5.3 billion in precious metals and $7.8 billion in Bitcoin. This may be one of the greatest commodity hedging transactions in history, which helps Tether's over-collateralization.
